required_buffers.name: reprojected_history
required_buffers.semantic: history color reprojected into the current frame

required_buffers.name: motion_vectors
required_buffers.semantic: per-pixel motion vectors in pixel units to the previous frame

required_buffers.name: reprojected_depth
required_buffers.semantic: previous-frame depth reprojected into the current frame

required_buffers.name: current_normals
required_buffers.semantic: current frame normals in a consistent view-space basis

required_buffers.name: reprojected_normals
required_buffers.semantic: previous-frame normals reprojected into the current frame

optional_buffers.name: optional_mask
optional_buffers.semantic: debug mask or ROI-like disclosure mask
